<div align="center">

# Xcelsior

### Canada-first GPU compute, built for teams everywhere.

Xcelsior is a GPU compute marketplace and operating layer for modern AI workloads, connecting customers who need reliable GPU access with providers who want to bring capacity online through a cleaner, more transparent platform.

[Website](https://xcelsior.ca) · [Docs](https://docs.xcelsior.ca) · [Pricing](https://xcelsior.ca/pricing) · [About](https://xcelsior.ca/about) · [Blog](https://xcelsior.ca/blog)

</div>

## What Xcelsior Is

Xcelsior is built in Canada and grounded in Canadian priorities like data sovereignty, CAD-native pricing, privacy, and practical compliance. At the same time, the platform is meant for a much broader community: startups, researchers, enterprises, independent builders, and infrastructure providers around the world who want better access to GPU compute and better visibility into how that infrastructure is run.

We believe AI infrastructure should be easier to trust, easier to access, and less opaque. That applies whether you are launching your first training job, serving inference in production, or turning underused GPU capacity into a new revenue stream.

## Feature Snapshot

| Area | What Xcelsior Delivers |
| --- | --- |
| Compute Access | On-demand, spot, and reserved GPU capacity for training, inference, experimentation, and production workloads. |
| Marketplace | Transparent hardware discovery, pricing visibility, provider insights, and clearer pathways to finding the right GPU for the job. |
| Instances | Launch instances fast, use templates or custom images, monitor status, inspect logs, and manage lifecycle actions from one dashboard. |
| Provider Network | Register hosts, onboard GPU workers, set pricing, track uptime, and participate in marketplace demand through a guided provider workflow. |
| Billing & Earnings | CAD-native billing, wallet-based usage tracking, taxes, invoicing, provider earnings, Stripe payouts, and support for modern payment flows. |
| Trust & Verification | Reputation, host verification, and trust-oriented platform mechanics that help strong providers stand out and help customers choose confidently. |
| Analytics & Telemetry | Real-time visibility into usage, infrastructure health, spending, earnings, utilization, and operational performance. |
| Compliance & Sovereignty | Canadian-first governance and compliance posture with tools that make residency, privacy, and accountability easier to operationalize. |
| Developer Experience | API docs, SDKs, CLI tooling, onboarding flows, and a setup wizard that reduce friction for both customers and providers. |

## Why Teams Use Xcelsior

- Launch GPU workloads without dealing with the usual mess of fragmented marketplace discovery, unclear pricing, and weak operational visibility.
- Keep sovereignty and compliance in view when Canadian data residency, privacy obligations, procurement constraints, or internal governance matter.
- Choose between flexible consumption models, from immediate on-demand capacity to spot pricing and reserved commitments.
- Use a unified dashboard for marketplace discovery, instance management, billing, notifications, analytics, compliance, and infrastructure insight.
- Gain more transparency around the infrastructure behind the workload, including provider quality, telemetry, operational state, and reputation signals.
- Move from experimentation to production with the same platform instead of stitching together separate tools for compute, payments, and host operations.

## Why Providers Use Xcelsior

- Bring GPU infrastructure online through a guided host registration and onboarding flow.
- Install worker tooling with an SDK and AI onboarding wizard designed to simplify setup.
- Set rates, manage host availability, track utilization, and watch earnings through a purpose-built provider experience.
- Build trust over time through consistency, verification, uptime, and marketplace reputation.
- Participate in a platform that treats provider operations as a first-class product area, not an afterthought.

## Built For The Full AI Workflow

Xcelsior is not only about renting a GPU. It is about making the whole experience more coherent:

- finding the right hardware
- launching and managing instances
- monitoring performance and events
- understanding spend and earnings
- onboarding and operating hosts
- handling trust, compliance, and sovereignty requirements
- giving teams and providers a cleaner path from setup to production

## Canada-First, Not Canada-Only

We are proudly Canadian in how we build and position the platform. That means strong emphasis on Canadian infrastructure priorities, CAD pricing, privacy, data sovereignty, and compliance-aware operations. But the mission is broader than geography alone.

Xcelsior is for teams everywhere who want a better way to access AI compute, and for providers everywhere who want to contribute infrastructure to a platform built with more transparency, stronger governance, and a more human operating model.

If Canada is a hard requirement for your workload, Xcelsior is designed to take that seriously. If you simply want a sharper, more accountable GPU platform, that matters here too.

## Our Direction

We are building toward an AI infrastructure layer that is:

- easier to trust
- easier to onboard
- easier to price and understand
- better for providers
- better for customers
- more aligned with real-world governance, not just raw compute throughput
